title: Analytics - Device Connected
scenario: Analytics event "device_connected" is logged with device PID and serial upon successful device connection to Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Bluetooth audio device is currently connected.
3. Put a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button until the LED flashes blue/red).
4. On the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen, tap the device name or "Connect" to initiate pairing.
5. Complete the pairing process and wait for the device to show as "Connected" on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to Firebase Analytics console and check the "device_connected" event under Events in the last 30 minutes.

7. Verify that the event includes the following default parameters: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
8. Verify that the event includes connection metrics: device PID and device serial.
expected: The "device_connected" analytics event is logged in Firebase with all default event elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and connection metrics (device PID, device serial) within a few hours of the device connection.
